context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Vault-seed-ready preflight is ready and its selected packages are now covered by committed changesets; worker tool readiness remains the plan-only promotion gate for agents-as-tools.
current_tasks: Commit 37aef5c9 fixed the vault-seed-ready release lane by adding first-public changesets for @refarm.dev/heartwood and @refarm.dev/release-engine and folding @refarm.dev/effort-contract-v1 into the initial contracts changeset.
scripts/ci/test-release-check.mjs now asserts every vault-seed-ready selected package is covered by changesets provider inputs before publication handoff.
Validated pnpm run release:readiness:test, refarm release preflight --selection vault-seed-ready --json, pnpm exec changeset status --since main --verbose, and after-commit finish.
The 10-package vault-seed-ready selection remains plan-only ready with 0 blockers and 24 required checks; public publish still requires explicit manual approval.
next_actions: Continue auditing vault-seed-ready SDK exports before publication, preferring neutral reusable names and compatibility aliases only when an existing public contract requires them.
When ready for heavier evidence, run pnpm run release:vault-seed:check once; it performs package publish dry-runs for the 10 selected packages and should not be repeated unnecessarily.
For agents-as-tools, consume assessWorkerToolReadiness() as the promotion gate; implement runtime-dispatch only after policy, cancellation, observability, and cost-control proofs are local and cheap.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
